interface.name: LM_LeaveRequestSummary
interface.description: The interface used for your record view

a:ruleInputTestConfigs.a:value: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_queryRecordType_v4"( recordType: #"urn:appian:record-type:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5", fields: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_selectionFields"( allFieldsFromRecordType: { #"urn:appian:record-type:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5", #"urn:appian:record-relationship:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/f97fc0b2-06c2-4bc3-8e4e-4a657d8f5fdd", #"urn:appian:record-relationship:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/1cc34258-7f90-40b2-844a-8a6ba39fcc6e", #"urn:appian:record-relationship:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/757ad836-cd37-4660-9938-949cab54095e", #"urn:appian:record-relationship:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/9fcc94f9-4862-4f15-a56d-953668727db8", #"urn:appian:record-relationship:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/b2986ed2-d514-423f-9f97-51e6bb9a23a2", #"urn:appian:record-relationship:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/449d67b5-ed40-4d7d-b4c8-c8f02d576f2d", #"urn:appian:record-relationship:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/286d1b5d-5a3e-4061-95b2-3be870410c87" } ), pagingInfo: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_pagingInfo"( startIndex: 1, batchSize: 1 ) ).data
